Home.name: Miroslav Novotny
Home.intro: IT student heading to CTU FIT with experience in full-stack development. I specialize in Next.js and Java (Spring Boot). I am also proficient in working with relational databases (SQL), Redis, and Linux administration.
Home.bio: Specializing in complex web applications within the React and Next.js ecosystem, with a focus on type safety and efficient infrastructure.
Home.about: Graduating May 2026 from Educanet Praha (IT focus) and admitted to FIT ČVUT (Computer Engineering). Active Arch Linux user btw🤓.
